wikiautomator-intro: Welcome to WikiAutomator. Manage your automated tasks below.
wikiautomator-trigger-page-create: Event: When new page is created
wikiautomator-scheduled-time-help: Task will run once at specified time and then auto-disable (at least 5 minutes from now)
wikiautomator-condition-title-help: Leave empty to monitor all pages.
wikiautomator-condition-ns-help: Enter namespace ID (e.g., 0=Main, 2=User). Leave empty for all namespaces.
wikiautomator-edit-summary-help: Leave empty to auto-generate summary (shows action type). This will appear in Recent Changes.
wikiautomator-error-no-steps: Error: Please configure at least one execution step.
wikiautomator-error-no-category: Error: Category change trigger requires a category name.
wikiautomator-error-no-scheduled-time: Error: Scheduled execution requires a time to be set.
wikiautomator-error-scheduled-time-futur: Error: Scheduled time must be at least 5 minutes in the future.
wikiautomator-warning-blank-replacement: Warning: Replacement is empty. This will delete all matched text.
wikiautomator-warning-replacement-exists: Warning: The replacement string already exists in some pages. Undoing may be difficult.
wikiautomator-rename-unmoveable: The following pages cannot be moved
wikiautomator-bot-edit-help: When checked, edits will be marked as bot edits in Recent Changes (hidden by default).
